steps.title: Read the boundary line
steps.content: The boundary has $y$-intercept $6$ and slope $-4$, so its equation is $y=-4x+6$.

steps.title: Use the shaded side
steps.content:
The shaded region is below the boundary line, so the inequality uses $y$ less than the line's value. The boundary is not included, so the inequality is strict.
$$y<-4x+6$$
The answer is A.
